intakeSummary: Founder can use fake-data rehearsal first.
requiredBefore: Authority, privacy, IDS, support, and field approval.
triageAction: Create private intake ticket; no real data in public demo.

intakeSummary: Business owner tests governance request and support pathway.
requiredBefore: Business field review and support route.

intakeSummary: Mentor can advise without approval authority.
publicBoundary: No private participant access by default.

intakeSummary: Partner can see public-safe progress only.
triageAction: Use public pages and approved updates.
Capture private review note outside public pack.

intakeSummary: Member testing is blocked until official-route acceptance.
publicBoundary: No member numbers or official records.

intakeSummary: Guest can test welcome and meeting discovery path.
Volunteer can test non-official sample agenda role.
requiredBefore: No evaluation or education record collection.

intakeSummary: Authority reviewer can decide go/hold/no-go privately.
Privacy reviewer approves fields, notice, support, and complaint route.
Data reviewer approves control, access, retention, export, delete.
Support owner confirms pause, complaint, incident, and correction routes.
